title: Record: 11L + order-adaptive 11-gram (mean val_bpb=0.8881)
body:
## Results

| Seed | val_bpb |
|------|---------|
| 42   | 0.8883  |
| 1337 | 0.8886  |
| 2024 | 0.8875  |
| **Mean** | **0.8881** |
| Std  | 0.0006  |

- Artifact: 13.99 MB
- Train: 600s on 8xH100 SXM
- Eval: ~160s

## Method

11-layer XSA-all transformer with order-adaptive entropy-gated n-gram backoff (orders 2-11). Higher-order matches use lower entropy threshold. GPTQ-lite int6 + zstd-22. Score-first, deterministic, no TTT.

- [x] 8xH100 SXM, train <=600s
- [x] Eval <=600s (~160s)
- [x] Artifact <=16MB (13.99MB)
- [x] 3-seed validation (std 0.0006)
